prompt: Design a screenshot of an X (formerly Twitter) profile, including the profile picture from the first image and a post from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a full screenshot of an X (formerly Twitter) profile page. In the top-left section, include a circular profile picture featuring the woman with long brown hair and a red and white floral dress from image 1. Below the profile header, display a single post that matches the dark theme, layout, and text content (including 'Name', '@Username', 'Your tweet here!', '12:00 PM · Jun 1, 2020', and action icons) of the example post provided in image 2.
objects: Full X (formerly Twitter) profile page UI
Woman with long brown hair and red and white floral dress from image 1 (as content of profile picture)
Single X/Twitter post below profile header, matching dark theme and layout of image 2
Action icons (reply, retweet, like, share - within the post)
